issue.title: Prohibit error_code construction from rvalues of error_category

discussion.p: Constructor error_code(int val, const error_category& cat) and member function void assign(int val, const error_category& cat) could be misused if a custom error_category is provided:

blockquote.pre: error_code ec{1, test_category{}}; // ec holds a pointer/reference to a temporary

discussion.note: Brno 2026-06-10; LWG agreed this is an improvement, need to change `error_condition` too.

superseded.p: This wording is relative to N4713.
